# Self to Self Therapy

> Virtual individual therapy practice offering Internal Family Systems (IFS) and EMDR to adults in Maryland, Washington DC, and Oregon. Queer, BIPOC, and trauma-affirming care.

## About the therapist

- **Name:** Amihan (Ami) Kernan
- **Credentials:** LICSW (Washington DC, Oregon), LCSW-C (Maryland)
- **Identity:** Queer, Asian-American / Filipino-American
- **Training:** Internal Family Systems (IFS), EMDR (Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing), mindfulness, motivational interviewing, strengths-based, relational therapy

## Services

- Individual psychotherapy (telehealth only, no in-person sessions currently)
- Free 20-minute phone or video consultation
- 55-minute sessions
- Typical cadence: weekly to start, then flexible based on client needs

## Who Ami works with

- Adults in Maryland, Washington DC, or Oregon
- Queer, trans, and gender-expansive people
- BIPOC clients
- Neurodivergent clients
- People navigating life between cultures
- Trauma, grief and loss, anxiety, depression
- LGBTQIA+
- Mental health providers seeking IFS training/consultation

## Fees and insurance

- In-network with: Regence BCBS, Aetna, Moda, Optum, and Carelon Behavioral Health in Oregon (through Headway)
- Out-of-network: superbill available for OON reimbursement
- Out-of-pocket rate: $175 per 55-minute session
- Sliding scale available in some cases — inquire about eligibility
- Cancellations: 24-hour notice required; late cancellations charged full session fee

## Contact

- Email: ami@selftoselftherapy.com
- Phone: (202) 618-0138
- Website: https://selftoselftherapy.com/
- Consultation booking: https://selftoselftherapy.com/contact.html

- [Home](https://selftoselftherapy.com/): Overview of practice
- [About Ami](https://selftoselftherapy.com/about.html): Ami's background and approach

- [FAQ](https://selftoselftherapy.com/faq.html): Consultations, telehealth, session length, frequency, expectations
- [Fees & Insurance](https://selftoselftherapy.com/fees.html): Rates, in-network insurers, cancellation policy, No Surprises Act
- [Contact](https://selftoselftherapy.com/contact.html): Consultation request form
